text.p: APPLICATION FOR DAYS RELEASE FOR MPHIL/PH.D STUDY PROGRAMME

This is to formally inform the University that I have been offered and commenced a MPhil/Ph.D in Anthropology at the University of Ibadan. I started the programme during the 2nd Semester (Rain Semester) of 2008/2009 Academic Session. The programme is scheduled to last for 36 calendar months

The decision to undertake my PhD programme at the University of Ibadan was informed by the fact that there was no Senior Academic staff on ground in the field of Anthropology to supervise my PhD work in the department at the time that I applied and commenced the programme. It was obvious that undergoing a postgraduate programme in that University at that time was critical to my academic development and capacity building in the Department.

I, therefore, passionately appeal for Days Release to enable me undertake this programme. I attached with, a copy of my letter of admission into the programme, payment slip, my updated CV, and a letter of assumption of duty.
I shall be very grateful for your kind consideration
